name: Stir-Fried Medley
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine water, cornstarch, soy sauce, sherry, sugar, and ground ginger. Set aside.
2. In a bowl, beat the eggs.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a skillet until it coats the bottom of the pan.
4. Add beaten eggs to the skillet and spread them into a thin layer. Cook until the bottom is set into a pancake.
5. Turn the egg pancake and cook until the top is set. Transfer the pancake to a cutting board and cut into 1/4-inch wide strips.
6. In the same skillet, cook ground beef until well browned. Add green onions and cook for 1 minute.
7. Drain off excess fat. Add thawed frozen green beans and the soy sauce mixture (from step 1) to the beef.
8. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened. Stir in the egg strips.
9. Serve over hot cooked rice. Serves 4.
